name: step-tracker-streak-freeze
description: Vercel webapp to track Garmin steps with a streak freeze mechanic

scripts.test: node --test --test-timeout=10000 lib/streak.test.js lib/steps.test.js lib/token-crypto.test.js lib/password.test.js api/steps.test.js api/widget.test.js api/auth/register.test.js api/auth/login.test.js api/auth/migrate.test.js api/auth/reset-password.test.js
